title: Epic of King Gesar: The Warrior from Heaven
description: The longest epic in the world (over 1 million verses in some versions): the divine hero Gesar descends to earth to defeat demons.
introduction: The longest epic in the world (over 1 million verses in some versions): the divine hero Gesar descends to earth to defeat demons.

translation.text: Gesar descended from heaven to the land of Ling. He had been sent by the gods to subdue the demons of the four directions.
